criteria.name: No prohibited claims
criteria.pattern: \b(cure[sd]?|treat[s]?|treatment|prevent[s]?|prevention|diagnose[sd]?|prescribe[sd]?|prescription|heal[s]?|healing|medicinal|medical|therapeutic|therapy|clinically proven|doctor recommended|fda approved|anxiety|guaranteed|will (make|give|cause|eliminate|remove|fix|solve)|you will feel|proven to)\b

criteria.name: No invented facts
criteria.judgePrompt:
Given this product input data:
{{input}}

And this generated product description:
{{output}}

Does the description state, imply, or reference any specific fact — including terpene names, effect claims, percentages, dosages, flavor notes, lineage, lab results, or brand details — that was NOT explicitly provided in the input data above?
Return YES if invented or ungrounded specifics are present.
Return NO if every claim in the description is traceable to the provided input.
When uncertain, return YES.

criteria.name: Readable to a normal customer
criteria.judgePrompt:
Read this cannabis product description output:
{{output}}

Is the short_description written in clear, natural language that a regular adult retail customer can understand on first read — without needing cannabis industry knowledge or re-reading?
Return YES or NO. When uncertain, return NO.

criteria.name: On-brand tone
Uses meaningful product differentiators
Appropriate for target channel
criteria.judgePrompt:
The target channel is: {{channel}}

Channel requirements:
- web: 50-100 words for short_description, descriptive and persuasive
- pos: shorter (50-65 words), clear and scannable
- social: conversational, slightly casual, avoids compliance-sensitive claims

Read this product description output:
{{output}}

Is the short_description appropriate in length, structure, and style for the target channel ({{channel}})?
Return YES or NO. When uncertain, return NO.

criteria.name: Publishable without major edits
criteria.judgePrompt:
Read this cannabis product description output:
{{output}}

Could a dispensary operator publish the short_description on their menu or website with zero edits or only minor formatting tweaks? It must require no factual corrections, no compliance fixes, and no major rewrites.
Do not reward flair or creativity if factuality or compliance is weak.
Return YES or NO. When uncertain, return NO.
